ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
Language: jupyter-notebook
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA curated collection of educational resources related to general purpose GPU programming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
Language: jupyter-notebook
End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adrida/tracer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adrida/tracer
Language: jupyter-notebook
TRACER: replace 90%+ of your LLM classification calls with a traditional ML model. Formal parity guarantees. Self-improving.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-ml2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml2
Language: jupyter-notebook
⛔️ DEPRECATED – See https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml3 or handson-mlp instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the Gemini API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/CLIP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/CLIP
Language: jupyter-notebook
CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining), Predict the most relevant text snippet given an image

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services
